creator: kitchetech@gmail.com
text:
Nervermind previous email patch works fine guess when I checked earlier it
kept giving me a different archieve I approve the patch since there is no
official release but the branch has been broken off to 0.1.1

On Tue, Jun 28, 2011 at 8:10 PM, matt donovan <kitchetech@gmail.com> wrote:

> Appears that the new Master_site that was added is incorrect I'll get a new
> patch since the distfile is called tip.tar.gz and the distfile would need to
> be called correctly to be used.since hg, git versions are not good for the
> port versions.
>
>
> On Sun, Jun 19, 2011 at 1:21 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>wrote:
>
>> Maintainer of x11/sterm,
>>
>> Please note that PR ports/158033 has just been submitted.
>>
>> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>> and a committer will take care of it.
>>
>> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158033
>>
>> --
>> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>>
>
>
>
> --
> Technological progress is like an ax in the hands of a pathological
> criminal.
> -*Albert Einstein
>
> Breadth of Unix experience and depth of knowledge in the world of servers.
>
> *
>
